title: Sour Fluffy Yogurt Stir-Fry
description: A savory solo-dinner Chinese dish featuring full fat yogurt blended with dumplings for a unique sour and fluffy texture, perfect as a low-sodium-friendly option.
instructions: Blend full fat yogurt with garlic and scallions in a blender until smooth.
Add sesame oil, olive oil, and soy sauce to the blended yogurt mixture. Stir well.
Cook dumplings in boiling water for about 2 minutes or until they float to the surface. Remove from heat.
Heat a wok or large frying pan with a small amount of oil over medium-high heat. Add the yogurt mixture and stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes, stirring frequently until thickened.
Gently fold in cooked dumplings and simmer for another minute to allow flavors to meld together.
